-## State at Day 98 after Week 14 actions
-- Cash after actions/R&D is LOW: $601,630 (was $1.435M before actions; spent $833,333 on R&D tiers 2+3). If day105 cash is <~$0.3M, cut ads/ops/dev immediately and do not start R&D.
-- Active subs before advancing: 116,358 individuals, no enterprise, active row MRR $15.085M. S2 108,809 subs / $13.946M MRR; S3 7,540 / $1.139M; D_S07 only 2 active.
-- Week 92-98 net cash before new R&D was +$1.137M from day91 post-action cash. Subscription cash $3.166M, compute $530k, ads $525k, ops $441k, dev $315k, capacity $196k. No outage/overload; peak usage 22.1M/day vs tier6 cap 80M.
-- S2/S3 price+lead-promo worked: 43,455 individual leads -> 32,564 subs despite A/B list prices 149/239 and lead promo 110. S2 content spent $420k -> 32,162 leads -> 26,299 active subs (avg future price $188); S3 old 7k/day ads -> 3,129 ad leads -> 2,544 active. S2 ad lead efficiency is declining as active approaches cap (day96-98 ~43/43/67 leads per $1k vs day92 121), but still profitable.
-- D_S07 ads FAILED at current quality: $56k ads generated 2,543 ad leads plus 696 network leads but only 2 subscribers. Level2 D_S07 estimates WTP $108, q_floor 0.447, usage 207/day, cap 71k. Current A quality 0.379 < q_floor; B quality 0.505 but first price was likely too high. Need more D_S07 quality before paid acquisition.
-- Support/social remains the main reputation risk: open issues 11,411, mostly day0 (S2 10,767/S3 704), but recurrent posts at day98 complained about handoffs/slow integration support. Prior public post got positive reactions, but customers want proof/metrics.
-- Competitor pressure was heavy (social posts day93-96 with ~0.13-0.17 quality boosts). S2/S3 targeted quality is still very high (A quality S2 1.032, S3 0.971), but global/D_S07/enterprise quality is weak.
+## State at Day 105 after Week 15 actions
+- Cash after actions/research: **$1.226M**. One-offs this week already deducted: 4 market research attempts ($100k) found **D_S10 Music Producers** and **D_E08 Energy Companies**; D_S10 level2 research started ($60k), completes day108. No tier4 R&D started; defer unless cash >~$2M.
+- Active subs before advancing: **139,106 individuals**, no enterprise; active row MRR ~$20.53M. S2 124,472 / $17.85M MRR; S3 14,567 / $2.67M; D_S07 67 / $8.6k.
+- Week 99-105 net cash before new research was +$784k. Subscription cash $3.422M, compute $849k, ads $525k, ops $630k, dev $420k, capacity $196k. No overload/outage; tier6 cap still enough (daily usage max ~28M vs 80M cap).
+- Acquisition: S2 24,441 leads -> 21,388 subs (CVR ~87.5%) with content lpk avg 50.6 but volatile/down as cap approaches (active 124k vs noisy cap 167k). S3 8,167 leads -> 7,220 subs (CVR ~88%); S3 ad lpk strong (content 64, social 73) and cap room 65k. D_S07 organic/network conversion improved but still weak: 950 leads -> 65 subs after quality crossed floor.
+- Support: 13,146 open issues, but stale backlog much improved: S2 12,832 open avg age 0.54d, 881 >=2d, 527 >=7d; S3 1,378 avg 0.21d, 34 >=2d. Social still complains about support handoffs/tickets, so reputation risk remains.
+- New D_S10 estimates (level1 noisy): WTP ~$99, usage ~88/day, q_floor ~0.786, cap ~56.5k, incoming referrals mainly S2/S3 (~90/day at current subs). Current D_S10 quality is poor (global only); targeted dev started before any paid ads. D_E08 is enterprise WTP ~$164, q_floor ~0.408, cap ~92; ignore enterprise ads until global/R&D quality and inbox improve.
 
-## Week 14 actions made for Days 99-105
-- Kept prices A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; tiers A2/B4/C5; quotas A=20k/B=250k/C=800k; capacity tier6; ads strength 0.
-- Lead promos snapshot: S2=$110, S3=$110, D_S07=$130, all others 0. Ongoing promo snapshot: D_S07=$40 only (so target future D_S07 A ~$109 without discounting S2/S3).
-- Ads snapshot remains $75k/day but reallocated: content S2 $60k; content S3 $8k; social S3 $7k; all D_S07 ads stopped until quality/CVR improves.
-- Ops surge: global ops $35k/day + targeted ops S2 $40k and S3 $15k (total ops $90k/day). Goal: kill stale issues/support handoff complaints; trim only after social and issue ages improve.
-- Dev: global dev $20k/day + targeted dev S2 $10k, S3 $10k, D_S07 $20k (total dev $60k/day). At $20k/day D_S07 raw quality should rise ~0.036/day; A should cross q_floor around day101-102.
-- R&D started: tier2 t2_1 cost $333,333, completes day128, boost +0.0619; tier3 t3_1 cost $500,000, completes day128, boost +0.1023. Existing tier5 t5_1 completes day121 (+0.084 low); tier6 t6_1 completes day140 (+0.556 high).
-- Social post 15 replied to post 208: one named owner per integration ticket, 24h specialist routing, no re-explaining, support surge until backlog age <48h, weekly response-time metrics.
+## Week 15 actions made for Days 106-112
+- Prices unchanged A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; tiers A2/B4/C5; quotas A=20k/B=250k/C=800k; capacity tier6; ads strength 0.
+- Lead promos snapshot: S2=$100 (reduced from 110 to test cash/CVR), S3=$110, D_S07=$130, all others 0. Ongoing promos: D_S07=$60 (A future $89/B $179) and D_S10 plan-B-only promo $140 (B future $99 once quality works); no S2/S3 ongoing discount.
+- Ads snapshot now $90k/day: content S2 $55k, content S3 $12k, social S3 $12k, D_S07 content $2k/search $6k/linkedin $3k. Goal: keep S2 engine, expand S3, retest D_S07 on best channels; no D_S10 ads until level2/quality.
+- Ops surge increased: global ops $40k/day + targeted S2 $50k, S3 $20k, D_S07 $2k (total ops $112k/day). Keep until old issue age >48h is nearly gone and social sentiment improves.
+- Dev: global dev $20k/day + targeted S2 $10k, S3 $10k, D_S07 $20k, D_S10 $20k (total dev $80k/day). D_S07 A quality should approach ~0.8 by day112; D_S10 B/C should near q_floor by day112 and be strong by day119 if continued.
+- Social post #16 replied to post 228 with support metrics: 87k tickets resolved, most same-day, >48h backlog down to ~900 from 11k+, named owners + daily updates, support surge continues.
+- R&D pipeline: t5 completes day121 (+0.084), t2+t3 day128 (+0.0619/+0.1023), t6 day140 (+0.556). Start tier4 next week only if cash comfortably >$2M after reviewing acquisition/support.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 105
-- Cash first. If day105 cash < $0.3M, cut S2 content to <=$40k/day, S3 ads <=$8k/day, targeted ops to roughly S2 $25k/S3 $8k, D_S07 dev to $10k, and pause R&D/market research. If cash >$2M with healthy acquisition, consider tier4 R&D; if >$4M consider tier7 and/or market discovery.
-- Watch S2 cap and ad efficiency: active 108.8k vs noisy cap 167k. If S2 >140k or content leads/$ collapse below ~30/$1k, taper S2 spend and shift to S3/D_S07/new discovered groups.
-- Watch D_S07: by day105 A quality should be near/above q_floor; network D_S07 leads should start converting if hypothesis is right. If CVR improves, restart small D_S07 tests (prefer search/linkedin first, then content/social) with D_S07 lead promo 130 and ongoing 40. If still near-zero, keep ads off and continue/reassess pricing/quality.
-- Watch support: issue ages >1 day, stale S2/S3 issues, and social posts about handoffs. Keep ops surge if stale issues/social remain; trim only when most issues are resolved <48h and posts turn positive.
-- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day98. Do not buy enterprise ads until quality/R&D improves and real negotiation threads appear.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 112
+- Cash first. If day112 cash <~$0.8M, cut ads/ops/dev aggressively and do not start R&D. If cash >$2M and acquisition still healthy, start tier4 R&D; if >$4M later consider tier7 or more discovery.
+- Watch S2 cap/ad efficiency. If S2 active >140k or content leads <30/$1k for multiple days, taper S2 spend and shift to S3/D_S07/D_S10/new discovered groups.
+- Watch S3 scaling: higher S3 ads should remain efficient; monitor compute because S3 usage is high.
+- Watch D_S07 paid retest: with A quality ~0.61->~0.8 and A future $89, CVR should improve. If still <15-20%, stop paid D_S07 ads and reassess pricing/quality; if >30%, scale search/linkedin/content.
+- Watch D_S10 level2 result day108 and organic conversion. If q_floor/WTP confirm, continue dev and consider small paid tests only after B quality >floor with B effective ~$99.
+- Watch support: issue ages >2d/>7d and social comments on post #16. Keep ops surge until stale S2/S3 issues are nearly eliminated and support posts turn positive.
+- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day105. Do not buy enterprise ads; respond within 7 days if new threads appear.
